subject: [PATCH v5 03/11] mm: handle PMD swap entries in fork path

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch improves the handling of PMD swap entries in the fork path by mirroring the behavior of copy_nonpresent_pte(). It introduces a new function, swap_dup_entries_direct(), which can duplicate a contiguous range of swap slots. The patch also adds a retry mechanism for table allocation failures and preserves the THP (Transparent Huge Pages) during the fork process.
